rule-failed-inspection-blocks-acceptance.description: GR or production output with failed inspection cannot be accepted without NCR

rule-critical-ncr-requires-immediate-act.description: Critical non-conformances require corrective action within 24 hours

rule-corrective-action-deadline-alert.description: Alert responsible when corrective action is approaching deadline

rule-ncr-closure-requires-verified-actio.description: NCR can only be closed when all corrective actions are verified
